description: Test fixture: Application that should receive a REJECT verdict

observability.metrics: Server uptime check via ping, no application metrics
observability.logging: Application logs to local disk, rotated weekly
observability.alerting: Email notification if server goes down

incident_management.on_call: Team lead's personal phone number shared with ops

resilience.fault_tolerance: Single VM, single disk, no replication

deployment.strategy: Replace files directly on production server

expected_blocking_gaps: No SLOs defined for P1 service
